title: My pet crocodile (axolotl variant)
description: This resource pack changes around 20% of all axolotls into tiny crocodiles.
body:
This resource pack changes around 20% of all axolotls into tiny crocodiles. There are 3 variants: brown, olive and green.

Credits:
Coding template: More Axolotl Colors By SR400XSR400X
Axolotl textures: Faithful 32x https://faithfulpack.net/
Crocodile model and texture: made by me

You will need optifine or similar mods to see this change
